mapper.sql: id, task_id, version_no, env, version_status, publish_status, dag_json, dsl_json, input_schema_json, output_schema_json, test_status, test_execution_id, rollback_from_version_id, publish_time, created_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO df_task_version (task_id, version_no, env, version_status, publish_status, dag_json, dsl_json, input_schema_json, output_schema_json, test_status, rollback_from_version_id, created_by) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{versionNo}, #{env}, #{versionStatus}, #{publishStatus}, #{dagJson}, #{dslJson}, #{inputSchemaJson}, #{outputSchemaJson}, #{testStatus}, #{rollbackFromVersionId}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM df_task_version WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM df_task_version WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM df_task_version WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND env = #{env} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM df_task_version WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND env = #{env} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
